articles.author: Simon J. Levien
articles.title: America’s doctors just voted for war with RFK Jr. - Politico
articles.description: The American Medical Association has sought a working relationship with the health secretary. Members saw moral compromise.
articles.content:
Fryhofer, who advised the vaccine committee whose members Kennedy fired last year, suggested that would be an abdication of doctors moral duty.
